mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_registration WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(visit_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayRegistrationCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_consultation WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS todayVisitCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PAID', 'REFUNDED') AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(paid_at) = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(paid_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN refunded_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(refunded_at) = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(refund_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0) AS todayIncome, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_member WHERE deleted = 0 AND open_date = CURDATE()) AS todayMemberCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN ('PENDING','PARTIAL')) AS pendingChargeCount

SELECT statDate, SUM(visitCount) AS visitCount, COALESCE(SUM(income), 0) AS income FROM ( SELECT DATE(paid_at) AS statDate, COUNT(*) AS visitCount, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) AS income FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN ('PAID', 'REFUNDED') AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(paid_at) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(paid_at) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(paid_at) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(refunded_at) AS statDate, 0 AS visitCount, -COALESCE(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS income FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND refunded_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(refunded_at) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(refunded_at) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(refunded_at) ) daily GROUP BY statDate ORDER BY statDate

choose.when: SELECT drug_name AS name, SUM(quantity) AS value FROM clinic_inventory WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY drug_id, drug_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(source, '未知') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_patient WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY source ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN pay_method = '会员卡' THEN '会员消费' ELSE '非会员消费' END AS name, SUM(COALESCE(paid_amount, 0) - COALESCE(refund_amount, 0)) AS value FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN ('PAID', 'REFUNDED') AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(paid_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY CASE WHEN pay_method = '会员卡' THEN '会员消费' ELSE '非会员消费' END ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
choose.otherwise: SELECT COALESCE(doctor_name, '未分配') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_registration WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY doctor_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.order_no AS orderNo, c.registration_id AS registrationId, c.patient_id AS patientId, c.patient_name AS patientName, c.charge_type AS chargeType, c.department_name AS departmentName, c.doctor_name AS doctorName, c.receivable_amount AS receivableAmount, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.paid_amount AS paidAmount, c.refund_amount AS refundAmount, c.pay_method AS payMethod, c.refund_method AS refundMethod, c.status, c.cashier, c.paid_at AS paidAt, c.refunded_at AS refundedAt, c.remark, c.created_at AS createdAt, p.patient_code AS patientCode, p.age, p.gender, p.phone, COALESCE(m.level_name, p.member_level) AS memberLevel, m.member_type AS memberType, m.card_no AS memberCardNo, m.balance AS memberBalance, m.points AS memberPoints, r.registration_no AS registrationNo, r.visit_time AS visitTime, r.visit_type AS visitType, r.department_name AS registrationDepartment, r.doctor_name AS registrationDoctor, r.registration_fee AS registrationFee, r.diagnosis_fee AS diagnosisFee, co.prescription AS consultationPrescription, co.check_items AS consultationCheckItems FROM clinic_charge_order c LEFT JOIN clinic_patient p ON p.id = c.patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN clinic_member m ON m.patient_id = c.patient_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN clinic_registration r ON r.id = c.registration_id AND r.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN clinic_consultation co ON co.id = ( SELECT co2.id FROM clinic_consultation co2 WHERE co2.deleted = 0 AND co2.registration_id = c.registration_id ORDER BY co2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

choose.when: SELECT ageRange AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) IS NULL THEN '未知' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 10 THEN '0-10岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 20 THEN '11-20岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 30 THEN '21-30岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 40 THEN '31-40岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 50 THEN '41-50岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 60 THEN '51-60岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 70 THEN '61-70岁' WHEN COALESCE(r.age, p.age) <= 80 THEN '71-80岁' ELSE '80岁以上' END AS ageRange FROM clinic_registration r LEFT JOIN clinic_patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND DATE(r.visit_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.visit_time) <= #{endDate} ) age_stats GROUP BY ageRange ORDER BY FIELD(ageRange, '0-10岁', '11-20岁', '21-30岁', '31-40岁', '41-50岁', '51-60岁', '61-70岁', '71-80岁', '80岁以上', '未知')

SELECT COALESCE(r.gender, p.gender, '未知') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_registration r LEFT JOIN clinic_patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND DATE(r.visit_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.visit_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY COALESCE(r.gender, p.gender, '未知')

SELECT COALESCE(p.marriage,'未知') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_registration r LEFT JOIN clinic_patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND DATE(r.visit_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.visit_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY COALESCE(p.marriage,'未知')

SELECT COALESCE(m.member_type, p.member_level, '非会员') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_patient p LEFT JOIN clinic_member m ON m.patient_id = p.id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(m.member_type, p.member_level, '非会员')

SELECT COALESCE(p.source,'未知') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM clinic_registration r LEFT JOIN clinic_patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND DATE(r.visit_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(r.visit_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY COALESCE(p.source,'未知')

SELECT co.id, co.order_no AS orderNo, co.charge_type AS chargeType, l.business_type AS orderType, i.drug_id AS drugId, i.drug_code AS drugCode, i.drug_name AS drugName, i.manufacturer, i.specification, i.unit, ABS(l.change_quantity) AS quantity, CASE WHEN i.quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(i.purchase_amount / i.quantity, 2) END AS purchasePrice, CASE WHEN i.quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(i.retail_amount / i.quantity, 2) END AS retailPrice, ABS(l.change_quantity) * CASE WHEN i.quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE i.purchase_amount / i.quantity END AS purchaseTotal, ABS(l.change_quantity) * CASE WHEN i.quantity = 0 THEN 0 ELSE i.retail_amount / i.quantity END AS retailTotal, co.paid_at AS paidAt, COALESCE(co.paid_at, l.created_at) AS createdAt FROM clinic_inventory_log l LEFT JOIN clinic_inventory i ON i.id = l.inventory_id AND i.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN clinic_charge_order co ON co.order_no = l.business_no AND co.deleted = 0 WHERE l.deleted = 0 AND l.business_type = 'SALE' AND DATE(COALESCE(co.paid_at, l.created_at)) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(COALESCE(co.paid_at, l.created_at)) <= #{endDate}
AND (co.charge_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderType}, '%') OR co.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderType}, '%') OR (#{orderType} LIKE '%处方%' AND co.charge_type LIKE '%门诊%') OR (#{orderType} LIKE '%零售%' AND co.remark LIKE '%药%'))
AND (co.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.drug_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY COALESCE(co.paid_at, l.created_at) DESC, l.id DESC

SELECT d.category AS drugCategory, d.drug_code AS drugCode, d.name AS drugName, d.manufacturer, d.specification, i.quantity, i.retail_amount AS amount, i.purchase_amount AS purchaseTotal, i.retail_amount AS retailTotal, (i.retail_amount - i.purchase_amount) AS profit FROM clinic_drug d LEFT JOIN clinic_inventory i ON i.drug_id = d.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.quantity DESC
